## Release notes label

<!-- 必选一个 -->

- [ ] `release-notes:feature` — 新功能
- [ ] `release-notes:fix` — bug 修复
- [ ] `release-notes:breaking` — 破坏性变更
- [ ] `release-notes:internal` — 内部（不出现在用户可见 changelog）
